content.en: How much money have you spent today? It is more than you think!
content.tw: 你今天花了多少錢呢？可能比你想的多喔！

content.en: Think about brushing your teeth. You need a toothbrush and toothpaste. They cost money. Want to rinse your mouth? That is also not free! Water costs money.
content.tw: 就拿刷牙來說，你仔細想想，刷牙需要牙刷跟牙膏，這些都要錢吧?刷完牙要用水漱口，水也要錢！

content.en: Lots of things cost money. People need money to live. So… they get a job.
content.tw: 很多東西都要用錢買，人們有錢才能生活，所以要去工作賺錢！

content.en: People who work for money are workers. Another word for work is labor. May 1st is Labor Day in Taiwan. That is today! It is a day for workers.
content.tw: 為了賺錢而工作的人叫做勞工，每年的5月1日是台灣的「勞動節」，也就是今天！這是勞工一起慶祝的節日。

content.en: On Labor Day, some workers march together. They march for better and safer work.
content.tw: 在勞動節這天，有些勞工會上街遊行，爭取更好、更安全的工作環境。

content.en: The workers carry signs. The signs say what the workers want. The signs may say things like 'equal pay,' 'fewer working hours,' or 'save our jobs.'
content.tw: 勞工會拿著各式各樣的標語，上面寫著「同工同酬」啦、「縮短工時」啦，或是「我要工作」等等。

content.en: Workers everywhere are worried about AI now. AI may take their jobs. AI makes jobs too. But many are low-paying jobs.
content.tw: 現在很多勞工擔心 AI 會搶走他們的工作。雖然 AI 也會創造新的工作機會，但是薪水並不高。

content.en: This year, workers' signs will be about AI. They will say things like 'humans first, not AI' or 'make AI good for workers too.'
content.tw: 所以，今年的勞動節遊行很多標語會跟AI有關！比如說: [人第一，AI第二]。

content.en: What will workers march for when you grow up?
content.tw: 當你長大後，勞工會為什麼而遊行呢？

vocabulary.preface: 五一勞動節，是全世界的工作人員會共同慶祝的節日。

content.text:
1. grow up 長大。
I'm so tired. 我好累! I need a vacation!我需要休假! You know, when I was growing up, 你知道嗎，我一路長大，I never thought I'd end up an office worker.從來沒想到我會變成上班族。

2. how much 多少。
And yet…here you are.結果你到了這裡。
Yeah… here I am.對啊，我到了這裡。Tell me, how much money do we really need to live?告訴我，我們究竟需要多少錢來生活?

3. everywhere 每個地方。
More than you think. 比你想的多。The cost of living is going up everywhere.每個地方的生活費都在上漲。

4. pay 薪資。
That's the problem. 那就是問題所在. My pay never feels enough. 我覺得薪水從來就不夠。

vocabulary.postscript: 請跟我複習單字。grow up長大 how much多少 everywhere每個地方 pay薪資

quiz.question: 1. When is Labor Day in Taiwan?
2. What do workers carry with them when they march?
3. What are workers worried about this year?

title: Woman Finds Surprise in Egg Tart

content.en: Egg tarts are delicious. Millions and millions are eaten every year! But a woman in Kaohsiung did not eat hers.
content.tw: 蛋塔味道香甜，每年大家會吃掉好幾百萬個蛋塔！但是高雄一位女士卻沒有吃到。

content.en: The woman bought some egg tarts from a restaurant. She took them home. They were cold. Her family told her to microwave them. They taste better when they are hot, right?
content.tw: 女士在一家店買了蛋塔，帶回家後發現已經冷掉了。家人說她可以用微波爐加熱，熱熱的蛋塔比較好吃！

content.en: But the woman was hungry. She wanted to eat an egg tart now! Then, she saw something black on it. She broke it into two pieces. And she pulled out a battery!
content.tw: 但她實在太餓了，想馬上把蛋塔吃掉，竟然拉出整顆電池！

content.en: Batteries can hurt our stomachs. And they can start fires in microwave ovens. Batteries can explode in them too!
content.tw: 電池如果吃下去會傷害身體，放進微波爐還可能起火爆炸！

content.en: How did the battery get into the egg tart? A restaurant cook was making some egg tarts. The cook used a timer. It fell on the tarts. The battery from the timer went into one!
content.tw: 電池怎麼會跑進蛋塔裡？原來是廚師在做蛋塔時，用了計時器。它不小心掉到蛋塔上，裡面的電池就掉進其中一個蛋塔裡了！

content.en: The restaurant's rules say to throw away food when something falls in it. But the cook did not throw away the egg tarts.
content.tw: 店裡規定，有東西掉進食物裡就要丟掉。但那位廚師沒有把蛋塔丟掉！

content.en: The woman was lucky! She did not eat the egg tart. And she did not microwave it!
content.tw: 這位女士真幸運！她沒有吃掉蛋塔，也沒有用微波爐加熱它！

vocabulary.preface: 這位女士經歷了蛋塔驚魂記，不過她至少毫髮無傷。

content.text: 1. hot 熱的。Careful, that food is really hot! 小心，那盤食物很燙! I know, but I'm too hungry to wait. 我知道，但是我太餓了，等不及了。
2. hurt 傷害。You're going to hurt your tongue again. 你又會燙到舌頭。It's fine… 還好吧... Oh! Okay, maybe not fine. 也許不大好。
3. microwave oven 微波爐。That's the thing with microwave ovens. 這是微波爐的缺點。It's hot on the outside but still cold on the inside. 外面很燙，但是裡面還是冷的。
4. start 開始。I should learn to cook, that's for sure. 我肯定應該學做菜。You can start with popcorn.你可以從爆米花開始。Popcorn? Please - I'm way better than that! 爆米花? 拜託! 我比那厲害多了!

vocabulary.postscript: 你有用過微波爐嗎? hot熱的 hurt傷害 microwave oven微波爐 start開始

quiz.question: 1. Why didn't the woman microwave the egg tart?
2. What was in the egg tart?
3. How did the woman find it?
options: a. She ate the egg tart.
b. The cook told her about it.
c. She broke the tart into two pieces.

content.en: Taroko National Park is in Xiulin Township. The park has many mountains! Twenty-seven are three thousand meters tall or taller!
content.tw: 位於秀林鄉的太魯閣國家公園內有很多高山，其中有 27 座山高達三千公尺以上。

content.en: Taroko is named for the Truku people. They are indigenous peoples. Most people living in Xiulin are Truku.
content.tw: 太魯閣這個名字來自太魯閣族，是台灣的原住民。秀林鄉居民大多都是太魯閣族人。

content.en: Tourists love Taroko. They hike its paths. They climb its mountains. But mountains can be dangerous. So Xiulin is training Truku people to be mountain guides.
content.tw: 很多遊客喜歡在太魯閣地區走步道或是爬山，但是高山總有危險。因此秀林鄉正在訓練太魯閣族人成為登山嚮導。

content.en: The new guides are learning about nature. They are learning how to find and help lost people. They are learning how to read maps, camp, make fires, and much more!
content.tw: 這些嚮導學習自然知識，也學習怎麼尋找與幫助迷路的登山客。他們會看地圖、露營、生火等等技能！

content.en: These guides will help keep people safe on mountains. They will know the paths. They will know where to hike and climb safely. When the weather changes, they will be able to help. When there is an emergency, they will be able to save lives!
content.tw: 這些嚮導可以保障登山客或是遊客的安全。他們認得山路，也知道哪裡可以安全攀登。天氣發生變化的時候也能幫忙。遇到緊急狀況，嚮導甚至可以救人一命。

content.en: The Truku people of Xiulin are working hard to keep us safe in Taroko National Park. The next time you are on a mountain, get a guide!
content.tw: 秀林鄉的太魯閣族人正努力保障我們在太魯閣國家公園的安全。下一次你去爬山時，記得找個嚮導！

vocabulary.preface: 受過訓練的太魯閣高山嚮導，對登山客有很大的幫助。

content.text:
1. climb 攀爬。
Let’s go climb Xiangshan this Sunday. 我們這星期天去爬象山吧。
Climb? You mean like walking up a bunch of stairs? 爬山?
你的意思是爬一堆樓梯?
Yeah, pretty much, nothing too steep. 差不多，階梯並不陡。

2. path 小徑。
Wait, I thought it was just an easy hike. 等等，我以為只是輕鬆健行。
It is! You can’t find an easier path than Xiangshan.
確實是，你找不到比象山更輕鬆的了。

3. able 能夠。
Even so, I won’t be able to hike more than 20 minutes.
就算那樣我最多也只能走二十分鐘。
What?! 什麼啊?!
And I’m taking snack breaks. 而且我要點心休息時間。

4. next time 下一次。
Forget it. I’ll catch you next time. 算了，我下次再找你。

vocabulary.postscript:
來一起讀單字。
climb攀爬 path小徑 able能夠 next time下次

quiz.question: 1. Where is Taroko National Park?
2. Who is the township training to be guides?
3. What do these guides do?
options: a. Keep people safe on mountains

content.en: A baby monkey is famous online. His name is Punch.
content.tw: 有一隻小猴子在網路上非常有名，名叫 Punch。

content.en: Punch lives in a zoo in Japan. He does not have a mother. Zookeepers take care of him.
content.tw: Punch 住在日本的一座動物園。他沒有媽媽，從小由飼養員照顧。

content.en: At first, Punch had no monkey friends. He had an orange orangutan friend. But it was a stuffed animal.
content.tw: 一開始，Punch 沒有任何猴子朋友。他有一個橘色的紅毛猩猩朋友，但那只是玩偶。

content.en: The stuffed orangutan was bigger than Punch. But Punch held it all the time. He hugged it when he slept. People online said Punch and his orangutan were very cute together!
content.tw: 這隻玩偶比 Punch 還大，但 Punch一直抱著它，連睡覺的時候也不放開。網友都覺得他們很可愛！

content.en: But Punch was lonely. So he tried to make friends with the other monkeys at the zoo. Some were not nice to him. They pushed him away. This made him sad.
content.tw: 不過Punch還是很孤單。他努力跟動物園裡的其他的猴子交朋友。有一些猴子對他不太友善，還把他推開，這讓他很難過。

content.en: But Punch was brave. He kept trying. He learned how to play with the other monkeys. Slowly, he made friends!
content.tw: 但Punch很勇敢！他不斷的嘗試，學會怎麼跟其他的猴子一起玩，慢慢也有了朋友！

content.en: Now Punch sometimes holds his stuffed orangutan. But he plays with his monkey friends. People online are happy for him. Some give him more stuffed animals. He shares them with his friends.
content.tw: 現在，Punch有時候還是會抱著玩偶，也會和朋友一起玩耍。網友都替他高興，有些人還送他更多玩偶讓他跟朋友分享。

content.en: Sometimes making friends is hard. You may feel lonely. But being brave helps you make new friends!
content.tw: 有時候交朋友很難。你可能會感到孤單。但勇敢一點能幫助你結交新朋友！

vocabulary.preface: 小猴子有了真正的朋友，不再那麼依賴絨毛玩具。

content.text:
1. lonely 寂寞的。
Welcome back! 歡迎回來!
Hi, so good to see you! 看到你真好!
You must feel lonely without us. 沒有我們你一定很寂寞。

2. sad 悲傷的。
Of course I missed you guys. 我當然很想念你們囉!
But I was so busy I didn’t have time to be sad. 不過我也忙到沒空悲傷。

3. share 分享。
You have to share your stories with us. 你一定要跟我們分享你的故事。
Oh, I’ve got tons of great stories! 我有很多很棒的故事。

4. sometimes 有時候。
You know I traveled across 9 countries?
Sometimes I had friends with me, but sometimes it was just me.

vocabulary.postscript:
Do you sometimes feel lonely?
lonely寂寞的 sad悲傷的 share分享 sometimes有時候

quiz.question: 1. Where does Punch live?
2. At first, who was Punch’s friend?
3. What did Punch want to do?
options: a. Make friends with other monkeys

title: Taiwan's Last Ferry Paddled by Hand

content.en: The Xindian River is in New Taipei. People cross this river every day. They go to school. They go to work. Many people drive on a bridge. But some ride the ferry.
content.tw: 新店溪位於新北市，很多人每天上學、上班都要過這條河。有些人開車，也有人選擇搭渡船到對岸。

content.en: This ferry is a small wooden boat. The ferryman stands at the back. He moves the ferry with a long paddle. One end is in his hands. The other is in the water.
content.tw: 新店溪的渡船是一艘小木船。船夫站在船尾，用一支長長的槳來划船，一端在船夫的手裡，另一端在水裡。

content.en: People get on the ferry. They sit. Then the ferryman paddles. The ride is five or six minutes.
content.tw: 乘客上船坐好後，船夫就開始划槳。整趟旅程大約只需要五、六分鐘。

content.en: There were nine ferries a long time ago. Then bridges were built. This ferry is Taiwan's last ferry paddled by hand! The ferryman wants it to keep going. But his job is hard.
content.tw: 很久以前，這裡一共有九艘渡船。大橋落成之後乘客減少，這艘船成為台灣最後一艘用人力划的渡船！船夫希望繼續下去，但這份工作很辛苦。

content.en: The ferryman starts at six in the morning. He stops at seven at night! He works seven days a week! He gets a one-day holiday every year. Summers are hot. Winters are windy. No one wants his job!
content.tw: 船夫每天早上六點開始工作，到晚上七點才休息。一週工作七天，每年只放一天假。夏天很熱，冬天風很大，所以沒有人想要這個工作。

content.en: Now tourists ride the ferry too. Riding the ferry costs thirty Taiwan dollars. Kids under six ride for free!
content.tw: 現在很多觀光客會來搭這艘船。船票是三十元台幣，六歲以下的小朋友免費！

content.en: This summer, take a ride with the ferryman!
content.tw: 這個夏天，來和船夫一起搭趟船吧！

vocabulary.preface: 用人力划的渡船就快絕跡了，最後一艘在新店。

content.text:
1. river 河流。
The best biking trails in Taipei are along the river.
台北最好的自行車道都在河邊。
Oh, like the Tamsui River? 像淡水河嗎?
Yeah, and the Keelung River too. 對，還有基隆河。

2. summer 夏天。
A long time ago, my dad and I used to ride there together,
很久以前我爸爸會跟我一起騎車，
enjoying the summer breeze. 享受夏日涼風。

3. windy 颳風的。
What about in winter? 冬天呢?
We wouldn't go then. 我們冬天不會去。
It gets too windy. 風太大了。

4. drive 駕駛。
Do you still go biking? 你現在還騎車嗎?
Not anymore. 不騎了。
I drive now… same breeze, no effort. 我現在開車，一樣的涼風，卻不需要用力。

vocabulary.postscript:
你對河流認識多少？
river河流 summer夏天 windy颳風的 drive駕駛

quiz.question: 1. How does the ferryman move the ferry?
2. How long is the ferry ride?
3. How many days a week does the ferryman work?

content.en: Are you in Taipei? Ride on Buses 611 or 287. These buses can tell you good things that will happen to you. They tell fortunes!
content.tw: 如果你在台北的話，可以去搭搭看 611 或 287號公車！這兩路公車會告訴你未來可能會發生的好事！

content.en: Many buses have stop buttons. These buses do too. People press them when they want to get off the bus.
content.tw: 一般公車都有下車鈴，乘客要下車就按一下。

content.en: But the buttons on these buses are different. The yellow buttons have a blue circle and then a purple circle around them. The purple circle has fortunes on it: "get one hundred on a test," "find love," "stay healthy," and more!
content.tw: 但是這兩路公車的下車鈴不一樣。黃色下車鈴外面有個藍色圓圈，圓圈外圍是紫色圈，寫著「考試一百分」、「下車遇到愛」、或是「平安又健康」等句子。

content.en: How does it work? Press the button. You will see a light go around in the blue circle. It slowly stops at your fortune!
content.tw: 要怎麼算命呢？只要一按下車鈴，藍色圓圈裡的小燈就開始轉動，最後停在一個句子旁！

content.en: One bus rider pressed the button. The fortune said "win the lottery." The bus doors opened. A lottery store was there!
content.tw: 一名乘客按了下車鈴，藍色燈停在「彩券中大獎」旁邊。剛好公車車門一開，就是一家彩券行！

content.en: Fortune-telling buses are fun to ride. But do not press the button more than one time. Press it when you get off the bus. It is a stop button!
content.tw: 算命公車很好玩，不過只要在下車的時候按一次按鈕就好了，畢竟它本來就是下車鈴！

content.en: Are the fortunes for fun? Or are they real? Ride one of these buses and find out!
content.tw: 這些運勢只是好玩而已嗎？還是真的？去搭搭看其中一輛公車來找出答案吧！

vocabulary.preface: 算命公車是為了給乘客一點小小娛樂，讓心情輕鬆一下。

content.text:
1. for fun 為了好玩。
Do you really believe in fortune-telling? 你真的相信算命?
Kind of. But mostly I do it for fun. 有一點，不過大部分是為了好玩。

2. bus 公車。
So what did he say this time? 這次他怎麼說?
He said I should take a taxi to my interview instead of taking a bus.
他說我應該搭計程車去面試，而不是搭公車。

3. real 真實的。
Seriously? Are you going to listen to him? 真的喔?你要聽話嗎?
Sure. I paid him 500 NT! 當然，我付了他五百塊!
It's real money! 那個錢可不假。

4. lottery 樂透彩。
Can I ask him about the lottery? 我可不可以問他彩券的問題?
No, don't do that! 不行，不要那樣!
That's not how it works. 算命不是那樣的。

vocabulary.postscript:
來一起讀單字。
for fun為了好玩 bus公車 real真實的 lottery樂透彩

quiz.question: 1. Which city's buses have the new stop buttons?
2. What color is the circle with the fortunes on it?
3. When do bus riders press the button?
options: a. When they want to get on the bus
b. When they want to get off the bus
c. When they want to know their fortune

title: These Very Small Robots Swim and Dance

content.en: Scientists in the U.S. made a very small robot. How small is it? Well, it's hard to see!
content.tw: 美國的科學家發明了一種微小的機器人，小到連肉眼都很難看見！

content.en: This robot gets power from the sun. It has a motor inside. But the motor is very, very small. It cannot push the robot in water.
content.tw: 這種小機器人用太陽能發電。機器人裡面有馬達，但馬達太小了，沒辦法在水中推動機器人！

content.en: But the robot can swim! It makes electricity. It sends the electricity into the water. That makes the water move. The moving water pushes the robot!
content.tw: 即便如此，機器人仍然會游泳！它自己發電，把電力送到水裡，流動的水會推著機器人前進。

content.en: The robot can do many things. It has a computer inside! It can move by itself. It does not need anyone to make it move.
content.tw: 這個小不點能做很多事情。它有一個微型電腦，還可以自己移動，不需要人操作。

content.en: The robot can find how hot or cold water is. It can tell people. But the robot does not say words. It does not write words. It dances in the water!
content.tw: 它也會測量水溫並回報這些資訊。但它不會寫字，也不會說話，所以用跳舞來表達！

content.en: The scientists watch the robot dance. The dance tells them how hot or cold the water is. Other dances tell them other things.
content.tw: 科學家看到機器人的舞蹈就知道水溫的高低。它的跳舞動作都有不同的含意。

content.en: Does this robot cost a lot? Well, three of them cost one Taiwan dollar! What?!
content.tw: 這種機器人會不會很貴？其實，三台這種微型機器人只要一塊錢台幣！

content.en: One day a robot like this may do things inside you to help you!
content.tw: 有一天，像這樣的機器人可能會在你的體內做些事情來幫助你！

vocabulary.preface: 微型機器人雖然小到幾乎看不見，卻能做很多事。

content.text:
1) swim 游泳。
The sun is so hot today! 今天太陽好熱!
Yeah, perfect weather for swimming. 是游泳的好天氣!
Is your swimming pool outside? 你的游泳池在室外?
It is. 是的。

2) sun 太陽。
And the water is kept warm by solar power. 太陽能讓池水保溫。
So the sun does all the work for you? 所以太陽替你做所有工作?
Pretty much! 差不多。

3) by itself 它自己。
It heats the water by itself. 太陽能系統自己把水弄熱。
Wow, that's cool! 好酷喔!
No, that's warm. 不對，是溫暖。

4) cost 花費。
Cool idea, warm water. 很酷的主意，溫暖的池水。
Exactly. 正是。
And it doesn't cost much. 而且沒花多少錢。

vocabulary.postscript:
Do you swim in summertime?
swim游泳 sun太陽 by itself它自己 cost花費

quiz.question: 1. What does the robot use to swim?
2. How does the robot tell scientists something?
3. How much do three of these robots cost?

title: Long Python from Long Ago Found in Taiwan

content.en: New living animals are often found in Taiwan. But sometimes people find new animals from long ago here too.
content.tw: 在台灣，人們常會新發現已經存在的動物。偶而也會發現很久以前存在，卻一直不為人知的種類。

content.en: Some of these animals lived hundreds of thousands of years ago. Their bones are found in the ground.
content.tw: 那些動物有些生活在幾十萬年前，化石到現在才被挖掘出來。

content.en: There is a good place to find animal bones from long ago. It is in Tainan. Some of the animals found there are so cool!
content.tw: 台南是個可以找到古老動物化石的好地方。其中有些動物很酷喔!

content.en: Experts found the bones of a big cat there. Maybe it was bigger than a lion! This cat had long teeth. Experts found some teeth and bones of very big crocodiles there too. Maybe they were six or seven meters long! Whoa!
content.tw: 科學家在那裡發現一種大型貓科動物，體型可能比獅子還大，有很長的牙齒。他們也找到鱷魚的牙齒跟骨頭，這種巨大的鱷魚，身長大約有六到七公尺！

content.en: Someone found a snake bone from long ago there too. Now, experts say the snake was four meters long! That is longer than any snake in Taiwan today!
content.tw: 還發現蛇的骨頭，那種蛇生活在久遠之前的古代。牠大約有四公尺那麼長，比現在台灣的任何蛇都要長！

content.en: This snake is a kind of python. No pythons have been found in Taiwan before. Experts thought pythons did not live here. Now they know pythons did!
content.tw: 牠是蟒蛇的一種。以前專家都認為台灣沒有蟒蛇，現在才知道其實是有的！

content.en: Hundreds of thousands of years ago, Taiwan had big cats and big crocodiles … and very long pythons! How sssssscary!
content.tw: 幾十萬年前，台灣有大型貓科動物、巨大的鱷魚……還有很長的蟒蛇！真是太恐怖了！

vocabulary.preface: 台南發現大型肉食動物的化石，例如鱷魚，蟒蛇等等。

content.text:
1. ground 地面。
Look what I found! 你看我找到什麼!
Where did you find it? 你在哪裡找到的?
In the ground, when I was planting tomatoes. 我種番茄時在地下發現的。

2. bone 骨頭。
I think those are human bones. 我覺得它是人類骨頭。
No way! You're trying to scare me, right? 不會吧!你在嚇唬我對不對?
Look, they're big. 你看它很大。

3. snake 蛇。
Bigger than cat bones. 比貓的骨頭大。
Maybe they're from a snake. 也許是一條蛇的。
A snake? You have snakes in your garden? 蛇? 你家院子裡有蛇?
I'm not sure. 我不確定。

4. expert 專家。
But I think I'll stop digging now! 但我可不要再挖了。
Yeah, and you'd better take the bones to experts. 對，而且你最好把骨頭帶給專家看看。

vocabulary.postscript:
Please read the words with me.
ground地面 bone骨頭 snake蛇 expert專家

quiz.question: 1. Where is the good place to find bones from long ago?
2. How long was the snake from long ago?
3. Which animal had not been found in Taiwan before?

content.en: Do you like to do what your parents do? Many kids do. One six-year-old girl does. Her mom goes to the gym. So the girl goes, with her mom. Her mom does strength training. So, the girl does!
content.tw: 很多小朋友喜歡模仿他們爸爸媽媽的行為。這個六歲的小女孩會跟她媽媽一起去健身房，並且跟媽媽一起做力量強化訓練！

content.en: The girl learned how to lift barbells safely. Barbells are long bars with circles at the ends. One day, she wanted to lift a heavy barbell. Her mom watched.
content.tw: 槓鈴是一根兩端有圓形鐵片的桿子。在健身房，這個女孩學會了如何安全的舉槓鈴！有一天，她想挑戰一個很重的槓鈴，她的媽媽就在旁邊看著。

content.en: The girl stood in front of the barbell. She bent down from her hips. She bent her knees. Then, she picked up the barbell with her hands. She stood and lifted it to her hips!
content.tw: 小女孩站在槓鈴前，彎下身體，再彎曲膝蓋，接著用雙手把槓鈴抓起來。她慢慢站直，最後成功把槓鈴舉到臀部的位置！

content.en: This six-year-old lifted 35 kilograms! Strength training made her strong!
content.tw: 這個六歲的小女孩竟然舉起了 35 公斤的槓鈴！力量強化訓練讓她身體變強壯。

content.en: Other kids do strength training with their parents too. Some do squats. Squats are like sitting down and then standing up from a chair ... again and again! But there is no chair! Strength training helps make kids stronger. Scientists say this can be good for kids.
content.tw: 也有其他的小朋友會跟爸媽一起做力量強化訓練，有些人會訓練深蹲。力量強化訓練可以幫助小朋友變得更強壯。科學家也認為這對孩子是有幫助的！

content.en: But, if you try strength training, an adult should watch you. Then you can get stronger safely!
content.tw: 但是，如果你嘗試力量訓練，應該要有大人在旁邊看著。這樣你才能安全地變強壯！

vocabulary.preface: 小朋友也可以練舉重，但是需要專業人士指導。

content.text:
1. lift 舉起。
I've finally joined a gym. 我終於加入健身房了。
Have you found a trainer too? 你也找了教練嗎?
A trainer? 教練?
Yeah, someone who can tell you how to lift weights. 對，他會告訴你怎麼樣舉重。

2. pick up 拿起來。
But I already know how to do that. 可是我已經知道怎麼做了。
Really? 真的嗎?
Yeah, you just pick up the dumbbell… 對啊，你就把啞鈴舉起來，
and try not to drop it. 然後不要讓它掉地上。

3. train 訓練。
No. There should be a better way of weight training. 不對，應該有更好的重訓方式。
Like what? 比如說怎樣?
Like choosing the right weight. 比如說選擇對的舉重量。

4. kilogram 公斤。
How much are you lifting right now? 你現在舉多少?
Five kilograms. 五公斤。
That's too heavy. 那太重了。

vocabulary.postscript:
我們一起來讀單字。
lift舉起 pick up拿起來 train訓練 kilogram公斤

quiz.question: 1. Where did the girl lift the barbell to?
2. How many kilograms did the girl lift?
3. What do some kids do for strength training?
options: b. Do squats again and again

content.en: Inuit are Indigenous peoples. They have their own language. They have their own ways of doing things. They hunt. They fish. And they live in very, very cold places.
content.tw: 因紐特人是原住民，他們有自己的語言和生活方式。他們住在天寒地凍的地方，以捕魚跟打獵維生。

content.en: Many Inuit live in north Canada. Inuit have lived there for thousands of years. The north is mostly ice and snow. Polar bears live there! Winters are very long and dark.
content.tw: 因紐特人已經在加拿大的北方生活了好幾千年。那裡的冬天漫長而黑暗，四周都是冰雪，還有北極熊！

content.en: Students there leave home to go to university. They go south to a city. But a new Inuit university will open in four years! It will be in a small Inuit town in the north.
content.tw: 當地的學生如果要上大學，通常要離開家鄉，到南方的城市去。不過，四年後將會有一所新的因紐特大學！這所大學位於北方一個小小的因紐特鎮。

content.en: One hundred students will study there. They will learn about Inuit ways and language.
content.tw: 這所大學會有一百多名學生，在那裏學習因紐特的生活方式跟語言。

content.en: The small town is getting ready. It has to plan carefully. There are no roads to the town! Everything comes by plane!
content.tw: 這個小鎮現在正在做各種準備。因為沒有通往小鎮的道路，所以任何物資都要用飛機才能運過去！

content.en: People in the town are excited. This university is very important. Students from other places will learn about the Inuit. And Inuit students will be able to study near their home!
content.tw: 鎮上的人們感到很興奮。這所大學非常重要。來自其他地方的學生將會學習關於因紐特人的文化，而因紐特學生也將能夠在靠近家鄉的地方學習！

vocabulary.preface: 因紐特人住在加拿大遙遠的北方，有獨特的生活方式。

content.text:
1. polar bear 北極熊。
I'm going to Alaska this summer. 我今年夏天要去阿拉斯加。
Alaska? Wow! 阿拉斯加，哇!
I want to see polar bears. 我要看北極熊。
From very far away, I hope. 希望你是從遠處看。

2. winter 冬季。
Of course. Bears look much cuter in photos. 當然，照片裡的熊可愛多了!
Too bad you won't see those long, dark winter nights.
真可惜你看不到又長又黑的冬天晚上。

3. ice 冰塊。
That's fine with me. 我還好。
I'll still get plenty of ice and snow. 還是可以看到好多冰雪。
Sure, it's Alaska after all. 當然，畢竟是阿拉斯加。

4. go fishing 去釣魚。
I may even go fishing there! 我甚至可能去釣魚!
Yeah, you may catch a seal! 對，可能釣到一隻海豹!

vocabulary.postscript:
許多動物園裡也有北極熊。
polar bear北極熊 winter冬季 ice冰塊 go fishing去釣魚

quiz.question: 1. Where do many Inuit people in Canada live?
2. How many students will study at the university?
3. How does everything come to the town?

title: Little Bird Causes Long Wait on Plane

content.en: Narrator: When people take a plane, they sit down. Then they wait for the plane to fly. But sometimes they have to wait and wait!
content.tw: 大家上了飛機之後坐好，等待飛機起飛。但有時候，可能要等了又等！

content.en: One day, a plane was in Hong Kong. It was going to Kaohsiung. The plane was almost ready to fly. But then, everyone got a big surprise. Something else flew!
content.tw: 一架飛機準備從香港去高雄。就在飛機要起飛的時候，乘客非常驚訝地發現，有東西在飛!

content.en: A small bird was flying in the plane! It was brown and gray. It was a sparrow! Whose was it? It was no one's!
content.tw: 原來是一隻麻雀在機艙裡飛來飛去！這隻麻雀不是主人帶來的喔！

content.en: The sparrow did not want to sit down. It flew over everyone.
content.tw: 這隻麻雀不肯乖乖地待著。牠到處亂飛。

content.en: The sparrow was from Hong Kong. But it did not have a passport! It did not have a plane ticket! It could not go to Kaohsiung!
content.tw: 麻雀來自香港，牠沒有護照，也沒有機票，牠不能去高雄！

content.en: Some people took pictures. Some tried to catch it. The flight attendants helped with walkie-talkies. Flight attendant: It's here! No, it's there! Narrator: But the sparrow flew fast! It was hard to catch!
content.tw: 有一些人忙著拍照，有一些人想抓住麻雀。空服員用對講機說[在這裡]，或[在那裏]。但是麻雀飛得很快，很難抓到！

content.en: Then a man caught the sparrow. He took it outside. The long wait was over. Everyone clapped!
content.tw: 最後，一名男子終於抓到了這隻麻雀，把牠帶到飛機外面。漫長的等待終於結束了，大家都熱烈鼓掌！

content.en: If you see a bird flying in a plane, what will you do?
content.tw: 如果你在飛機上看到有鳥在飛，你會怎麼做呢？

vocabulary.preface: 起飛之前麻雀飛進了飛機，讓乘客嚇一大跳!

content.text:
1. passport 護照。
They need an ID. 他們需要身分證。
Here, give them my passport. 來，給他們我的護照。
You carry your passport around every day? 你每天帶著護照出門?
Yeah. 對。

2. plane ticket 機票。
I never know when I'll be flying somewhere.
我永遠不知道什麼時候會飛到某個地方。
But you still need to buy a plane ticket! 但是你還是需要買機票!

3. fast 快速的。
That's fast and easy these days. 這年頭買票又快又容易。
Just a few clicks, and you're good to go. 只要按幾個鍵就好了。

4. ready 準備好。
I could never do that. 我完全不行。
I usually need three months to get ready. 我通常需要準備三個月。
Three months?! 三個月?!

vocabulary.postscript:
來一起讀單字。
passport護照 plane ticket機票 fast快速的 ready準備好

quiz.question: 1. Where was the plane?
2. What bird flew in the plane?
3. What did the flight attendants use?
